title: ai-squad Output Packet
description: Canonical structural contract for Output Packets emitted by all Subagents across squads. SDD Phase 4 Subagents: dev, code-reviewer, logic-reviewer, qa, blocker-specialist, audit-agent. Discovery Phase 2 Subagents: codebase-mapper, risk-analyst. Subagents self-validate against this schema before atomic write; orchestrator (per squad) re-validates on read and adds semantic checks (paths exist, status enum matches Role's allowed transitions). Role-specific fields are top-level optional with description noting which Role(s) may emit them.

spec_id.description: Squad-prefixed sequential id of the Session: FEAT-NNN for sdd, DISC-NNN for discovery

dispatch_id.description: Unique per-dispatch id; generated by orchestrator and round-tripped

role.description: Subagent that produced this Packet; orchestrator verifies match against dispatch. 'committer' added FEAT-006: auto-commit Subagent dispatched post-Phase-4 handoff.

blocker_kind.description: Required when status is blocked or escalate; enum maintained loosely (contract_violation, missing_test_infra, missing_test_for_ac, opaque_repo, insufficient_data, timeout, bypass_detected, etc.)

missing_for.description: qa-specific: AC ids that could not be reached when blocker_kind is missing_test_for_ac

summary.description: One-line summary, past tense, ≤ 120 chars (see output-packet.md summary format rules)

notes.description: Optional one-liner if explanation outside packet fields is needed

kind.description: SDD kinds: file | command | test | log | url | absence. Discovery kinds: user_signal | competitor_observation | metric_benchmark | expert_judgment | code_evidence | absence (shared). Each kind defines its own additional fields via additionalProperties: true.

findings.description: code-reviewer / logic-reviewer findings. Discovery's risk findings live at top level (risk_category/verdict/risk_severity/rationale).

audit_finding_kind.description: audit-agent findings ONLY — reconciliation gap categories from the 11 canonical checks (see agents/audit-agent.md). PM-mode kinds (pm_gate_violations, pm_cost_cap_exceeded) emitted only when pm_sessions[] is populated.

files_changed.description: dev-only: paths actually edited; orchestrator verifies subset of Work Packet's scope_files

ac_coverage.description: qa-only: AC id -> evidence ids that validate it; every AC in Work Packet's ac_scope MUST appear as a key

risk_category.description: risk-analyst-only: which Cagan Big Risk this dispatch investigated

verdict.description: risk-analyst-only: investigation outcome. inconclusive triggers gate; N/A requires rationale (1 sentence) explaining why this risk does not apply.

risk_severity.description: risk-analyst-only: 3-level scale canonical in Product/PM (Asana, SVPG). Distinct from findings[].severity (dev/reviewer use, 6-level).

rationale.description: risk-analyst-only: one paragraph narrative connecting evidence to verdict (pitch document pattern).

assumptions.description: risk-analyst-only: leap-of-faith items that remain unvalidated after this investigation (Torres assumption mapping). Surface to discovery-synthesizer in Phase 3.

validation_path.description: How this assumption could be validated (user interview, benchmark, expert review)

containers.description: codebase-mapper-only: C4 Level 2 containers (apps/services in scope). Each item carries name, technology, responsibility, and relationships.

next_role.description: Optional hint; orchestrator decides actual routing

usage.description: Per-dispatch token usage, populated by capture-subagent-usage.py Stop hook. Required for all roles except pm-orchestrator. Set to null when emitting; hook fills it in.
